final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing fantasy illustration of an underwater world (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 梦幻童话 (dreamy fairy-tale) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a sweeping underwater scene with multiple focal points — exact framing and depth layering are yours
Subject: must include:
  - a mermaid swimming among coral reefs
  - glowing jellyfish
  - a sunken shipwreck with treasure
Scene/backdrop: must include an underwater world with sunlight rays piercing down from the ocean surface, coral reef environment
Lighting/mood: needs a dreamy, luminous atmosphere with light shafts from above and bioluminescent glow — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vivid, kaleidoscopic dream-like direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs an illustrative, painterly surface treatment — exact texture and finish are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
